# Phase-19 — Leadership & Technical Strategy

> Lead architecture, teams, and strategy at staff-through-executive levels.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 67-70**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Technical Leadership](01_Technical_Leadership.prompt.md) | `Technical_Leadership.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 02 | [Architecture Reviews](02_Architecture_Reviews.prompt.md) | `Architecture_Reviews.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 03 | [Stakeholder Management](03_Stakeholder_Management.prompt.md) | `Stakeholder_Management.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 04 | [Technical Writing](04_Technical_Writing.prompt.md) | `Technical_Writing.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 05 | [Hiring and Interviewing](05_Hiring_and_Interviewing.prompt.md) | `Hiring_and_Interviewing.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 06 | [Mentoring and Team Building](06_Mentoring_and_Team_Building.prompt.md) | `Mentoring_and_Team_Building.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 07 | [Roadmap and Portfolio Planning](07_Roadmap_and_Portfolio_Planning.prompt.md) | `Roadmap_and_Portfolio_Planning.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 08 | [CDO and CAIO Playbook](08_CDO_and_CAIO_Playbook.prompt.md) | `CDO_and_CAIO_Playbook.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
